items.title: Stephon Castle on how the Knicks defense made it tough on him and his teammates:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Stephon Castle on how the Knicks defense made it tough on him and his teammates:

“They crowded the pick and rolls a lot, made us stagnant on the ball. When we tried get to isolation, they took away passing lanes too, made us play one-on-one a lot.”

items.title: The Spurs have De'Aaron Fox, Stephon Castle, and Dylan Harper
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
The Spurs have De'Aaron Fox, Stephon Castle, and Dylan Harper

San Antonio had a 1:6 assist-turnover ratio (Wembanyama had lone assist) while missing 9 of 12 shots in the paint

items.title: Stephon Castle, man — five fouls, hasn't made a field goal in the second half, but when De'Aaron Fox's shot went in the air, he beat Josh Hart to the offensive glass to draw the foul, and makes two *clutch* free throws to put the Spurs back up by one, 106-105, with 30.3 to go.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: Stephon Castle, man — five fouls, hasn't made a field goal in the second half, but when De'Aaron Fox's shot went in the air, he beat Josh Hart to the offensive glass to draw the foul, and makes two *clutch* free throws to put the Spurs back up by one, 106-105, with 30.3 to go.

items.title: STEPHON CASTLE.
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
STEPHON CASTLE. 

TWO CLUTCH FREE-THROWS.

Spurs 106
Knicks 105

30.3 seconds left in Game 4 on ABC!
